tool_create_task_param_project_id: Project UUID (defaults to the current chat project)
tool_create_task_param_deadline: Due date (optional). RFC3339 or natural English expression: "tomorrow", "tomorrow at 10", "on Friday", "in 2 days", "by the weekend", "by end of week".
tool_complete_task_param_task_id: Task UUID or display reference in <slug>#<number> format, e.g. inbox#5
tool_move_task_desc: Move a task to another project
tool_move_task_param_task_id: Task UUID or display reference in <slug>#<number> format, e.g. inbox#5
tool_list_tasks_desc: List tasks. Default: open only. Without project_id: all projects. Supports partial name search and result limit
tool_list_tasks_param_status: Status filter: open, done, cancelled. Default: open
tool_list_tasks_param_limit: Maximum number of tasks in the response (0 — no limit)
tool_set_project_desc: Link the current chat to a project: finds by name or creates it, remembers the binding
